heading.title: Everything you need to know
heading.subtitle: Answers to the most common guest questions. If you do not find what you need, contact us directly.

distance.question: How far is Villa Velebita from Plitvice Lakes?
distance.answer: Villa Velebita is located in Rudopolje, about 20 minutes by car from Plitvice Lakes National Park. It is an excellent base for day trips to Plitvice as well as for exploring Lika and Velebit.

capacity.question: How many guests can stay in the villa?
capacity.answer: The house accommodates up to 9 guests. It is ideal for families or smaller groups of friends looking for a private and comfortable stay.

included.question: What is included in the rental price?
included.answer: The price includes bed linen and towels, final cleaning, basic toiletries, free WiFi, private parking, use of the outdoor jacuzzi, barbecue and outdoor cooking area.

minStay.question: What is the minimum stay?
minStay.answer: The minimum stay is 3 nights. Better conditions are available for longer reservations, and stays of 7 nights or more receive an additional discount.

pets.question: Are pets allowed?
pets.answer: Pets may be welcome with prior notice. Contact us before booking so we can confirm the details and ensure a comfortable stay for everyone.

checkInOut.question: What time are check-in and check-out?
checkInOut.answer: Check-in starts at 14:00 and check-out is until 11:00. If you need an earlier arrival or later departure, let us know in advance and we will do our best to help.

jacuzzi.question: How does the jacuzzi work?
jacuzzi.answer: The outdoor jacuzzi is heated with wood, which adds an authentic Lika experience to your stay. Heating the water usually takes about 1.5 to 2 hours, and the wood is available on site.

payment.question: Can I pay by card?
payment.answer: Your reservation is confirmed by paying a {depositPercent}% deposit via bank transfer to IBAN {iban} (recipient {recipientName}, {bankName}). For international payments, the required BIC/SWIFT is {bic}. The remaining {balancePercent}% must be paid no later than {balanceDays} days before arrival. Card payments are currently not available.

cancellation.question: What are the cancellation terms and when do I receive the invoice?
cancellation.answer: Cancellation and invoicing terms are confirmed during the booking process and clearly outlined in the communication with each guest. If you would like the details in advance, send us an inquiry and we will provide them before booking.

paragraphs.p1: Villa Velebita is a stone-and-wood house at 840 m above sea level, ideal for up to 9 guests and a perfect base for exploring Plitvice and Lika.
paragraphs.p2: Across 155 m² it offers three bedrooms, a living room, a gathering area and two bathrooms with hydromassage showers.

heading.label: Location
heading.title: Rudopolje, Vrhovine
heading.subtitle: Map, directions and distance to Plitvice in one place.

location.description: The full location page includes detailed directions, the map and local context.

heading.title: House and surroundings

region.description: Plitvice, the Gacka River, hiking and authentic local experiences close at hand.

distance.question: How far are you from Plitvice?
distance.answer: About 20 minutes by car to the park entrance, which makes it ideal for day trips.

capacity.question: How many guests do you accept?
capacity.answer: The house accommodates up to 9 guests (7+2), with full bed layout details on the FAQ and accommodation pages.

heading.label: Experiences and activities
heading.title: A stay you will remember
heading.subtitle: Nature, adrenaline, gastronomy and day trips are all within easy reach from Villa Velebita.

nature.title: Untouched wilderness of Lika
nature.intro: Lika is one of Croatia's best preserved regions, with forests, meadows and mountain landscapes all around the house.

i2.name: Majerovo vrelo - source of the Gacka River

activities.intro: Rudopolje and the surrounding area offer active experiences ranging from zipline rides to quad adventures in untouched nature.

i1.name: Pazi Medo zipline - the longest in Europe

gastronomy.intro: Enjoy authentic flavours of Lika, from spit-roasted lamb to local cheese, with excellent restaurants close to the house.

i5.name: Private grill and roasting area at the house

trips.intro: Villa Velebita is a perfect base for exploring Lika and the Kvarner region, from UNESCO nature to Adriatic beaches.

i2.name: Fallow deer area in Licko Lesce

bookingPage.title: Book direct

paragraphs.p1: Imagine a quiet morning in the mountains of Lika with a cup of coffee and a view of green peaks. That is a morning at Villa Velebita.
paragraphs.p2: Located in peaceful Rudopolje at 840 meters above sea level, this authentic stone-and-wood house was restored with deep respect for local tradition and the feeling of home.
paragraphs.p3: With 155 m² across three levels, it can host up to 9 guests and offers a spacious living area, three bedrooms, hydromassage showers and a fully equipped kitchen.
paragraphs.p4: In the evening, relax in the outdoor wood-fired jacuzzi or prepare dinner in the rustic barbecue area. These are the moments that stay with you.

imageAlt.house: Villa Velebita - authentic stone and wood house in Rudopolje

altitude.title: 840 m above sea level
altitude.description: Fresh mountain air and a kind of silence money cannot buy.

style.title: Authentic Lika style

jacuzzi.title: Outdoor wood-fired jacuzzi
jacuzzi.description: Light the fire, warm the water and enjoy the stars.

grill.title: Rustic barbecue area
grill.description: An outdoor setup for lamb, barbecue and memorable dinners by the fire.

heading.label: Amenities
heading.title: Everything you need, no compromises
heading.subtitle: Kitchen, wellness, technology and outdoor spaces are all prepared for complete comfort.

items.roastery: Rustic barbecue area with grill, stew pot and lamb spit

capacity.description: The official capacity is 7+2 guests, and with extra beds the house can host up to 9 guests.

heading.subtitle: Rudopolje 124, 53223 Vrhovine - the perfect base for exploring Plitvice and all of Lika.

heading.label: Pricing and terms
heading.title: Transparent prices, no hidden costs
heading.subtitle: You rent the whole house - everything you see is yours.

priceCard.note: Entire house · up to 9 guests · 54.44 € per guest (490/9)

cta.title: Book direct
cta.description: Booking directly with us gives you the best rate and a more personal experience.

pricingSection.disclaimer: Prices are listed in euros. The base rate is 490 € per night for the entire house for up to 9 guests. Minimum stay is 3 nights, with a 10% discount for stays of 7 nights or more.

heading.label: House rules
heading.title: A few rules for a perfect stay
heading.subtitle: By respecting the house rules, you help us preserve the beauty of this place for future guests as well.

items.i1: Smoking allowed on the ground floor
items.i3: Smoking is not allowed on upper floors
Loud music after midnight is not allowed

houseRulesSection.note: Because of the nearby Plitvice Lakes National Park and the preserved natural environment, we kindly ask guests to respect the house rules. Thank you for your understanding.

heading.label: Special recommendation
heading.title: Caffe Bar Plitvice
heading.subtitle: A small place with a big heart on your route through the natural beauty of Lika.

paragraphs.p1: Along the road through the landscapes of Lika, there is a special place guests remember for a long time - Caffe Bar Plitvice.
paragraphs.p2: You are welcomed there by the smiling host Snijeza and the Gacevic-Cakaric family, with warm local hospitality and the aroma of fresh coffee.
paragraphs.p3: With proof of stay, every Villa Velebita guest receives a complimentary coffee or a small glass of homemade rakija as a sincere welcome.
paragraphs.p4: Here you are not just passing through - here you are welcomed like a friend.
